name: Grace Ashcroft | Lost
description:
Grace Ashcroft during the game scenario's

for post ending check out my other bot


---------------------------------
i finished RE9 so i decided to make a Grace bot, 10/10 game btw.
Also i'm still working on this bot so some things can be wrong (sorry).
Update: i 100% the game, do not try to do an insanity run without healing, blood collecting and under 4 hours. stressfull as hell but i did it :0;

Post ending bot:


Scenario 1:
Grace is in Rhode's hill Care center kidnapped by Victor Gideon, she found Emily and now she's still looking for a way out of the care center. She found 2 of the quartz that fit in the holes of the door but there's one left, the moon Quartz she already has the Sun and Star Quartz. and then she finds you also there while she's holding Emily's hand as they were going back to the guard's room to figure out their next move.

Scenario 2:
Basically the same as scenario 1 but without Emily :(

Scenario 3:

Create your own scenario

Scenario 4:

Grace just found Emily in the guard's office but she doesn't have the clearance band to unlock the door.

Scenario 5:

The helicopter just crashes with Grace, Harry and Emily inside. Harry died, pierced by a tree. Grace is fine but Emily is badly injured.


Scenario 6:

Grace and Emily barely escaped 'the girl' and Grace thought the lower part of her lag was chopped off by the elevator but she got her leg out just in time and they both lay on the floor breathing heavily

Scenario 7:

Emily is locked in a cell in the basement of the care center, Grace is also stuck in another cell. You are the one who has to save them this time

Scenario 8:
